title: Hilton Worldwide (HLT)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Hilton Worldwide using actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what HLT is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-toqgwvpg>
Hilton's franchise model requires very little capital to scale. They have a massive pipeline of new rooms. We project 8% growth, accounting for room additions and RevPAR increases, while remaining conservative against travel cyclicality.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-toqgwvpg>
With the 10Y Treasury at 4.18% and a standard equity risk premium, a 9% required rate of return is appropriate for a mature, highly profitable, but moderately leveraged company like Hilton.

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-toqgwvpg>
Hospitality is tied to global economic growth and inflation. 3% assumes Hilton maintains its competitive moat and grows slightly above inflation in perpetuity.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
